---
title: Admonitions
---

# Admonitions

> [!NOTE]
> Useful information the reader should know.

> [!TIP]
> A helpful tip with a [link](https://example.com) and **bold**.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Key information.

> [!WARNING]
> Something that could cause a problem.

> [!CAUTION]
> Negative consequences of an action.

> [!NOTE]

> An ordinary blockquote is left untouched.
> Second line of the quote.

> [!NOTE] this marker is not alone on its line, so it stays a quote.
